# Company Policies

## Refund Policy

Our refund policy allows full refunds within 30 days of purchase. Between 30 and 90 days,
pro-rated refunds are issued. After 90 days, no refunds are issued but account credits
can be applied toward future purchases.

Last updated: September 2024.

## Privacy Policy

We take your privacy seriously. All data is stored locally on your machine or your chosen
server. We do not send data to third parties. No telemetry. No analytics.

## Service Level Agreement

We target 99.9% uptime for all paid plans. Downtime notifications are sent via email within
15 minutes of an incident being detected.

## Pricing

| Plan     | Monthly | Annual (20% off) |
|----------|---------|------------------|
| Starter  | $29     | $278             |
| Pro      | $79     | $758             |
| Business | $199    | $1,910           |

## Contact

For support, email support@example.com. Response time is 24 hours on business days.
